name: Deferred - Vision - 2
description: Second returns for visions, prophecies, and unsettling signs.

results.description: [stat Faith 1] The vision from {origin} proved true enough to harden belief rather than soothe it.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO] What you had seen in {origin} was fulfilled badly enough that others mistrusted both the sign and the one who bore it.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [stat Faith 1] The old vision from {origin} found confirmation in the world and left your faith changed in texture if not in comfort.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [social -1] Your interpretation of the sign from {origin} made others wary even after later events seemed to favor you.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The vision from {origin} was fulfilled so quietly that only you fully appreciated its precision.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [stat Faith -1] The sign from {origin} misled you badly enough that belief became harder to offer and easier to examine.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [social 1] Others came to respect the old vision from {origin}, though not always in ways that made life easier.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The prophecy from {origin} was never proved, only shadowed by enough truth to remain troublesome.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [stat Faith 1] What you had seen in {origin} ceased to be theory and became one of the fixed things in your understanding of the world.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [social -1] The vision from {origin} brought you no comfort, only the burden of having been right unattractively early.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The sign from {origin} never resolved fully, but it refined how you looked at events afterward.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [stat Faith -1] The old vision from {origin} proved false or partial, and belief had to survive without the help you had once expected from it.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [social 1] Fulfillment of the sign from {origin} gave you a reputation for perception that others found useful even when you found it tiring.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp] The prophecy from {origin} dissolved into ambiguity, but the habit of reading signs remained with you.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [stat Faith 1] The old vision from {origin} proved true in substance if not in the exact form you had imagined.
results.name: vision-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] What you had seen in {origin} never quite stopped unfolding, which left certainty impossible and wonder unavoidable.
results.name: vision-2
